## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Broccoli and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on growth and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Broccoli is a fast-growing startup (0 to $2M revenue in 12 months) looking to accelerate growth through marketing and content](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and growth strategy, starting with a $20K 6-8 week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled to discuss specific opportunities for Broccoli and dive deeper into GrowthX's approach](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

## Topics

### Broccoli's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Founded 4 years ago, pivoted to current product 12 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Grown from $0 to $2M revenue and team of 3 to 9 people in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Recently raised capital, looking to invest in growth](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Current growth primarily through inbound leads and trade shows](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Seeking to establish marketing foundation and accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Two-phase engagement: 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content creation powered by AI workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor-in-chief and experienced growth leaders](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Emphasis on developing unique, high-quality content experiences beyond just blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Examples shared: interactive use case pages for Vappy, podcast content repurposing for Galileo](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Developing content strategy aligned with Broccoli's target personas and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Creating unique content experiences to differentiate from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Leveraging existing assets (e.g. video content) for multi-channel distribution](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content opportunities (e.g. industry-specific landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

### Next Steps Discussion

  - [AJ expressed interest but some hesitation about committing to long-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
  - [GrowthX team to prepare high-level overview of potential opportunities for Broccoli](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2437.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Thursday, June 26th at 9am PT](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2548.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to send calendar invite and set up Slack channel for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [AJ to share additional context: competitor info, inspirational brands/sites](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
  - [GrowthX team to prepare specific ideas and opportunities for Broccoli](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to dive deeper into GrowthX's approach and potential ROI](https://fathom.video/share/qqHxrT_ioqw5RcTQGF_DiYyXcEZ1ksLs?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
